---
title: "Figure_1"
author: "Daniel Schulz"
date: "2025-06-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(pals)
library(broom)
library(edgeR)
library(ggnewscale)
library(ggrepel)
library(pheatmap)
library(scater)
library(imcRtools)
library(ggnewscale)
library(UpSetR)
```

```{r}
mount_path <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/"
out_folder <- "/mnt/immucan_volume/processed_data/NSCLC2_cohort/Figures/Figure_1/"

if (!dir.exists(out_folder)) {
  dir.create(out_folder)
}
```


# helper function
```{r}
catHeader <- function(text = "", level = 2) {
    cat(paste0("\n\n", 
               paste(rep("#", level), collapse = ""), 
               " ", text, "\n"))
}

```




# datapoints per modality

```{r}
IMC1 <- unique(read.csv(paste0(mount_path,"Figures/scores_for_sharing/celltypes_minor_abundances_p1.csv"))[,"immucan_id"])
IMC2 <- unique(read.csv(paste0(mount_path,"Figures/scores_for_sharing/celltypes_minor_abundances_p2.csv"))[,"immucan_id"])
IF1 <- unique(read.csv(paste0(mount_path,"Figures/scores_for_sharing/celltypes_abundances_IF1.csv"))[,"immucan_id"])
IF2 <- unique(read.csv(paste0(mount_path,"Figures/scores_for_sharing/celltypes_abundances_IF2.csv"))[,"immucan_id"])
IF3 <- unique(read.csv(paste0(mount_path,"Figures/scores_for_sharing/celltypes_abundances_IF3.csv"))[,"immucan_id"])
RNA <- unique(sapply(X = list.files(paste0(mount_path,"data/RNAseq/STAR_counts/"), pattern = "*.counts.txt"),function(X) str_split_i(X,"-FIXT",1)))
WES <-  (unique(read_tsv(paste0(mount_path,"data/WES/mutation_signatures/Lung_NSCLC2_filtered.tsv"))[["patient"]]))
clin_dat <- read.csv("/mnt/immucan_volume/clinical_data/Lung_NSCLC2/20230825/NSCLC2_for_R_update_2024.csv")
dat <- data.frame(immucan_id = clin_dat$immucan_id,
                  clin_dat = 1,
                  IMC_p1 = ifelse(clin_dat$immucan_id %in% IMC1,1,0),
                  IMC_p2 = ifelse(clin_dat$immucan_id %in% IMC2,1,0),
                  IF_p1 = ifelse(clin_dat$immucan_id %in% IF1,1,0),
                  IF_p2 = ifelse(clin_dat$immucan_id %in% IF2,1,0),
                  IF_p3 = ifelse(clin_dat$immucan_id %in% IF3,1,0),
                  RNA = ifelse(clin_dat$immucan_id %in% RNA,1,0),
                  WES = ifelse(clin_dat$immucan_id %in% WES,1,0))

p <- ComplexUpset::upset(
    dat[,-1], intersect = colnames(dat[,-1]),
    height_ratio = c(0.6, 0.4),name = "Modality combinations")

pdf(file = paste0(out_folder,"1B_patients_per_modality.pdf"),
    width = 6,
    height = 4)
print(p)
dev.off()
```


# IF cell type densities
```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=20}
dens_dat <- readRDS(paste0(mount_path,"Figures/scores_for_sharing/densities_dat.rds"))

p <- dens_dat %>%
  pivot_longer(-immucan_id) %>%
  filter(!grepl("IMC", name)) %>%
  filter(!name %in% c("CD4_CD56_density__IF3",
                     "CD8_CD56_FOXP3_density__IF3",
                     "Treg_CD56_density__IF3",
                     "NKT_FOXP3_density__IF3")) %>%
  mutate(panel = str_split(name,"__",simplify = TRUE)[,2]) %>%
  mutate(name = gsub(pattern = "density__",replacement = "",x = name)) %>%
  filter(!grepl(pattern = "all",name)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = name,y = value, fill =panel))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust= 0.5, hjust =1, size= 10),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size =10),
        legend.text = element_text(size =10),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.title.x = element_blank())+
  labs(y = expression("Cell densities [mm"^2*"]"))+
  scale_y_log10()

ggsave(plot = p,filename = "1C_IF_cell_type_densities.pdf",device = "pdf",width = 10,height = 3.2,path = out_folder)

```

```{r}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
sce1 <- readRDS(paste0(mount_path,"data/IMC/Panel_1/Rout/sce.rds"))
sce2 <- readRDS(paste0(mount_path,"data/IMC/Panel_2/Rout/sce.rds"))
```

# cell type heatmap panel 1

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=20}
dat <- as.data.frame(colData(sce1))

use_channel <- rownames(sce1)[!grepl("DNA|Histone", rownames(sce1))]
mean_sce <- aggregateAcrossCells(sce1,
                                 ids = sce1$celltypes,
                                 statistics = "mean",
                                 use.assay.type = "exprs",
                                 subset.row = use_channel)

assay(mean_sce,"zscore") <- t(scale(t(assay(mean_sce,"exprs")),center = TRUE,scale = TRUE))

# generate marker classes for visualization
markers <- rownames(mean_sce)
marker_type <- c("cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","functional","cell identity","functional","functional","functional","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","functional","functional","functional","functional","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","functional","functional")
names(markers) <- marker_type
rowData(mean_sce)$marker_type <- marker_type

row_anno <- as.data.frame(colData(mean_sce)) %>%
  select(ids, ncells)
colnames(row_anno) <- c("CellType","ncells")
col_list <- list(CellType = metadata(sce1)$colour_vectors$celltypes)

pie(rep(1,length(row_anno$CellType)),col=col_list$CellType, labels = names(col_list$CellType))


heatmap_body <- t(assay(mean_sce,"zscore"))

#colnames(heatmap_body) <- c(colnames(heatmap_body)[1:26],"CAIX",colnames(heatmap_body)[28:37])
p <- Heatmap((heatmap_body),
        name = "exprs",
        clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",
        clustering_method_columns = "ward.D2",
        column_split = rowData(mean_sce)$marker_type,
        column_title = c("cell identity markers","functional markers"))+
  rowAnnotation(CellType = anno_simple(row_anno$CellType,border = TRUE,col =col_list$CellType))+
  rowAnnotation(n_cells = anno_barplot((row_anno$ncells)))+
  rowAnnotation(names = anno_text(row_anno$CellType,gp = gpar(fontsize=16)))

p

pdf(file =  paste0(out_folder,"cell_types_heatmap_panel_1.pdf"),width = 10, height = 6)
p
dev.off
```

# cell type minor heatmap panel 1

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=20}
dat <- as.data.frame(colData(sce1))

use_channel <- rownames(sce1)[!grepl("DNA|Histone", rownames(sce1))]
mean_sce <- aggregateAcrossCells(sce1,
                                 ids = sce1$celltypes_minor,
                                 statistics = "mean",
                                 use.assay.type = "exprs",
                                 subset.row = use_channel)

assay(mean_sce,"zscore") <- t(scale(t(assay(mean_sce,"exprs")),center = TRUE,scale = TRUE))

# generate marker classes for visualization
markers <- rownames(mean_sce)
marker_type <- c("cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","functional","cell identity","functional","functional","functional","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","functional","functional","functional","functional","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","functional","functional")
names(markers) <- marker_type
rowData(mean_sce)$marker_type <- marker_type

row_anno <- as.data.frame(colData(mean_sce)) %>%
  select(ids, ncells)
colnames(row_anno) <- c("CellType","ncells")
col_list <- list(CellType = metadata(sce1)$colour_vectors$celltypes_minor)
pie(rep(1,length(row_anno$CellType)),col=col_list$CellType, labels = names(col_list$CellType))


heatmap_body <- t(assay(mean_sce,"zscore"))

#colnames(heatmap_body) <- c(colnames(heatmap_body)[1:26],"CAIX",colnames(heatmap_body)[28:37])
p <- Heatmap((heatmap_body),
        name = "exprs",
        clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",
        clustering_method_columns = "ward.D2",
        column_split = rowData(mean_sce)$marker_type,
        column_title = c("cell identity markers","functional markers"))+
  rowAnnotation(CellType = anno_simple(row_anno$CellType,border = TRUE,col =col_list$CellType))+
  rowAnnotation(n_cells = anno_barplot((row_anno$ncells)))+
  rowAnnotation(names = anno_text(row_anno$CellType,gp = gpar(fontsize=12)))

p

pdf(file =  paste0(out_folder,"1D_cell_types_minor_heatmap_panel_1.pdf"),width = 10.5, height = 9)
p
dev.off
```

# cell type heatmap panel 2 

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=20}
dat <- as.data.frame(colData(sce2))

use_channel <- rownames(sce2)[!grepl("DNA|Histone", rownames(sce2))]
mean_sce <- aggregateAcrossCells(sce2,
                                 ids = sce2$celltypes,
                                 statistics = "mean",
                                 use.assay.type = "exprs",
                                 subset.row = use_channel)

assay(mean_sce,"zscore") <- t(scale(t(assay(mean_sce,"exprs")),center = TRUE,scale = TRUE))

# generate marker classes for visualization
markers <- rownames(mean_sce)
marker_type <- c("cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","functional","functional","functional","functional","functional","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","functional","functional","cell identity","cell identity","functional","functional","cell identity","functional","functional","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity")
names(markers) <- marker_type
rowData(mean_sce)$marker_type <- marker_type

row_anno <- as.data.frame(colData(mean_sce)) %>%
  select(ids, ncells)
colnames(row_anno) <- c("CellType","ncells")
col_list <- list(CellType = metadata(sce2)$colour_vectors$cell_types)
pie(rep(1,length(row_anno$CellType)),col=col_list$CellType, labels = names(col_list$CellType))


heatmap_body <- t(assay(mean_sce,"zscore"))

#colnames(heatmap_body) <- c(colnames(heatmap_body)[1:26],"CAIX",colnames(heatmap_body)[28:37])
p <- Heatmap((heatmap_body),
        name = "exprs",
        clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",
        clustering_method_columns = "ward.D2",
        column_split = rowData(mean_sce)$marker_type,
        column_title = c("cell identity markers","functional markers"))+
  rowAnnotation(CellType = anno_simple(row_anno$CellType,border = TRUE,col =col_list$CellType))+
  rowAnnotation(n_cells = anno_barplot((row_anno$ncells)))+
  rowAnnotation(names = anno_text(row_anno$CellType,gp = gpar(fontsize=16)))

p

pdf(file =  paste0(out_folder,"cell_types_heatmap_panel_2.pdf"),width = 10, height = 6)
p
dev.off
```

# cell type heatmap panel 2 

```{r, fig.height=7, fig.width=20}
dat <- as.data.frame(colData(sce2))

use_channel <- rownames(sce2)[!grepl("DNA|Histone", rownames(sce2))]
mean_sce <- aggregateAcrossCells(sce2,
                                 ids = sce2$celltypes_minor,
                                 statistics = "mean",
                                 use.assay.type = "exprs",
                                 subset.row = use_channel)

assay(mean_sce,"zscore") <- t(scale(t(assay(mean_sce,"exprs")),center = TRUE,scale = TRUE))

# generate marker classes for visualization
markers <- rownames(mean_sce)
marker_type <- c("cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity","functional","functional","functional","functional","functional","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","cell identity","functional","functional","functional","cell identity","cell identity","functional","functional","cell identity","functional","functional","cell identity","functional","cell identity","cell identity","cell identity")
names(markers) <- marker_type
rowData(mean_sce)$marker_type <- marker_type

row_anno <- as.data.frame(colData(mean_sce)) %>%
  select(ids, ncells)
colnames(row_anno) <- c("CellType","ncells")
col_list <- list(CellType = metadata(sce2)$colour_vectors$celltypes_minor)
pie(rep(1,length(row_anno$CellType)),col=col_list$CellType, labels = names(col_list$CellType))


heatmap_body <- t(assay(mean_sce,"zscore"))

#colnames(heatmap_body) <- c(colnames(heatmap_body)[1:26],"CAIX",colnames(heatmap_body)[28:37])
p <- Heatmap((heatmap_body),
        name = "exprs",
        clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",
        clustering_method_columns = "ward.D2",
        column_split = rowData(mean_sce)$marker_type,
        column_title = c("cell identity markers","functional markers"))+
  rowAnnotation(CellType = anno_simple(row_anno$CellType,border = TRUE,col =col_list$CellType))+
  rowAnnotation(n_cells = anno_barplot((row_anno$ncells)))+
  rowAnnotation(names = anno_text(row_anno$CellType,gp = gpar(fontsize=16)))

p

pdf(file =  paste0(out_folder,"cell_types_minor_heatmap_panel_2.pdf"),width = 10.5, height = 9)
p
dev.off
```
